title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBI Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBI Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RBI Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jabalpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About RBI Advisory Limited:
RBI Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI Advisory Limited!
